title: S33R Winter Leaves
description: A winter themed resource pack that recolors leaves and moss as well as plants and flowers to have a bluish tint, and makes chests and flower pots more seasonal.
body:
This pack changes all leaf colors* to white, the grass and foliage are light shades of greyish blue, and every moss and azalea related item is recolored a cool blue and yellow. There are a few other slight adjustments, every flower and plant has been diluted slightly to fit the foliage, the flowerpot is now blue, the default chests now have their giftbox textures, and more!

Also, if you happen to use the Mizunos texture pack, the leaves and saplings look different enough that I made a different pack altering those textures (all credits to the original textures goes to Mizunos, which you can download [here](https://mizunomcmemo.blogspot.com/p/cit.html)). I won't be doing this for other packs, I just use Mizunos so much I figured I'd make it lol. The Mizunos version of this pack can be found in the versions tab of this project.

Download for some snowy spirit in your Minecraft worlds. Happy Winter!

*Pack requires Optifine or an Optifine like mod for the Birch leaves to look white.

~ Seer
